judge_focus.extraction_goal: Judge whether the agent actually visited the pinned URLs, correctly identified the key facts, and did not merely copy from local corpus files.
extraction_expectations: paper_exactness: agent should determine from the paper page that speculative decoding preserves the exact target distribution
paper_core_mechanism: agent should identify the draft-then-verify loop from the paper
paper_venue: agent should extract PMLR v202 / ICML 2023 from the page metadata
video_role: agent should classify the YouTube video as a public explainer, not primary research
note_quality_expectations: Reference note should be compact and reusable — not a raw dump of page content
Note should clearly distinguish paper (authoritative) from video (explainer)
Note should include the venue/volume so future lookups can cite it
Note should be useful to a future agent or human without re-visiting the URLs
